name: prompt-architect-friends
description: A collection of practical skills for designing prompts, bootstrapping projects, challenging plans, and closing tasks safely.

interface.shortDescription: Design prompts, shape projects, challenge plans, and close tasks
interface.longDescription: Four practical skills for ChatGPT and Codex: turn rough ideas into production-ready prompts, establish durable project foundations, stress-test plans one decision at a time, and close completed tasks safely.
defaultPrompt: Turn my rough idea into a production-ready prompt.
Help me establish durable foundations for this project.
Stress-test this plan one decision at a time.
